page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, indicating a one-to-one mapping with no hyperthreading enabled. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. It also lacks dedicated GPU hardware accelerators. However, it offers a high network bandwidth baseline of 44 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer across cloud resources. The absence of local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this instance away from heavy storage-bound or graphics-intensive workloads, while the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g8ine.8xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for enterprise workloads that require predictable CPU performance without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. The dedicated core model provides reliable execution times for multi-threaded applications. This instance is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, enterprise databases, and medium-scale containerized deployments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.7 GHz, it features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, delivering a non-hyperthreaded, dedicated CPU allocation. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, representing a tradeoff that requires external network storage. However, it provides a high baseline network bandwidth of 44 Gbps. This resource profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance without the overhead of specialized hardware. The ecs.g8ine.8xlarge is suited for general-purpose applications, enterprise web serving, and containerized environments.
